next_local_action: If the operator approves, create exact public-copy drafts for these three entries as local files only. Do not post, reply, DM, follow, quote, tag, create a Fiverr gig/listing, contact clients, use private data, or run model/API calls from this packet alone.

posting to X, Fiverr, LinkedIn, blog, email, or any public channel
replying, DMing, following, tagging, quoting, or client outreach
using screenshots, customer examples, private data, copyrighted media, or platform logos
forbidden_claims: guaranteed revenue, client growth, ranking, reach, followers, or conversion
Fiverr endorsement, platform eligibility, seller approval, or marketplace rank
handling credentials, private client data, payment flows, or public posting by default
legal, tax, employment, compliance, or regulated-industry advice
use of copyrighted likenesses, music, media, or client assets without rights review
